params.text:
After navigating through various sections of the Chungnam National University Library website, I was unable to locate specific guides for each floor's study rooms within the library. The available information primarily covers general library services and locations rather than detailed room-specific guides.

If you need further assistance or have additional questions, feel free to ask!
